name: Auxiliary validation rule for Kernel & OS Hardening #13
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-KOH-13 in Kernel & OS Hardening category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for kernel & os hardening #13 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Auxiliary validation rule for Kernel & OS Hardening #13.
